name: Illefarn
author: Unknown
description:
Illefarn — A chronicle preserved in northern and coastal scriptoria — dates, names, and the sort of detail merchants pretend not to need. Library catalogues list no certain author; the work is dated to before 1372 DR.

Later hands added marginal dates and crossed out names; historians still argue which revisions were propaganda.

name: I'm a Harper, Get Me Out of Here
author: Wren of the Harpers
description:
I'm a Harper, Get Me Out of Here — Harper-related lore — coded, partial, and dangerous to quote without looking over your shoulder. Wren of the Harpers is credited in library catalogues; the work is dated to late 15th century DR.

Non-Harper readers report the prose is readable; Harper readers report it is a test.

name: Illustrated Adventures of Balduran
author: Unknown
description:
Illustrated Adventures of Balduran — Legends collected from tavern verse, elder memory, and sources no scholar will swear to in court. Library catalogues list no certain author; the work is dated to before 1492 DR.

Each generation adds a verse; purists claim the oldest layer is true and everything since is flattery.
